allow: Bash(sshpass -p 'Egyptluxury2026' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@212.90.120.64 "uname -a && node -v 2>/dev/null || echo ''Node not installed'' && nginx -v 2>&1 || echo ''Nginx not installed''")
Bash(plink -ssh root@212.90.120.64 -pw Egyptluxury2026 "uname -a && node -v 2>/dev/null || echo ''Node not installed''")

Bash(python -c "
import paramiko
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(''212.90.120.64'', port=22, username=''root'', password=''Egyptluxury2026''\)
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(''uname -a && cat /etc/os-release | head -5 && node -v 2>/dev/null || echo Node_not_installed && nginx -v 2>&1 || echo Nginx_not_installed''\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
print\(stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
ssh.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import paramiko
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(''212.90.120.64'', port=22, username=''root'', password=''Egyptluxury2026''\)
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(''systemctl is-active postgresql && psql --version''\)
out = stdout.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''replace''\)
err = stderr.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''replace''\)
print\(out\)
print\(err\)
ssh.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import paramiko
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(''212.90.120.64'', port=22, username=''root'', password=''Egyptluxury2026''\)
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(''sudo -u postgres psql -c ""SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname = \\''iluxuryegypt\\'';""''\)
out = stdout.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''replace''\)
err = stderr.read\(\).decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''replace''\)
print\(''OUT:'', out\)
print\(''ERR:'', err\)
ssh.close\(\)
")
